examples: Travellers with plenty of cash to spare can consider spending a night with the starfish at the shining Poseidon Undersea Resort in the Fiji islands.
At the very center was a hill and on top of the hill the majestic and stunning Temple of Poseidon, which was visible from everywhere in the holy emerald city.
Poseidon and Athena7 each wanted the honor.
Environmental issues aside, the biggest challenge for Poseidon, and desalination in general, is cost.
In multiplayer, players will pledge themselves to one of four gods: Zeus, Hades, Ares and Poseidon.
